PackageConfiguration.Author: Sawascwoolf
PackageConfiguration.Description: Edit Data Block start values and parameters in TIA Portal — single and in bulk

System.Security.Permissions.FileIOPermis.Comment: SimaticML export/import, config/profiles/license cache in %TEMP%\BlockParam and %APPDATA%\BlockParam, project-local rules folder.

System.Security.Permissions.UIPermission.Comment: WPF bulk-change dialog, license key dialog, autocomplete and inline hint popups.

System.Security.Permissions.FileDialogPe.Comment: FolderBrowserDialog for picking the shared rules directory in the config editor.

System.Security.Permissions.EnvironmentP.Comment: Resolve SpecialFolder.ApplicationData and MachineName for per-user storage paths and machine-bound license obfuscation.

System.Net.WebPermission.Comment: HttpClient calls to the BlockParam license server for online license activation and validation.

Siemens.Engineering.AddIn.Permissions.Pr.Comment: Launch default browser via Process.Start(UseShellExecute=true) to open shop checkout and customer-portal URLs from the license dialog.
